Title: Insights v2.0.6 strict date contract
Author: edog-tester@microsoft.com
Description: Reject Insights date ranges > 60 days with HTTP 400 instead of silently returning partial data. Closes WI 123456.

WorkItems.Title: Enforce 60-day strict date contract on Insights range endpoint
WorkItems.AcceptanceCriteria: GET /api/insights/range must return HTTP 400 with a clear message when (endTime - startTime) > 60 days. Inside the limit, return HTTP 200 with insights data.
WorkItems.DescriptionSnippet: Users report stale data when query ranges exceed 60 days; enforce a hard cap with a 400 instead.
